trivia_bullets.text: Jeskai Banner is one of five clan banner artifacts in Khans of Tarkir (released 2014-09-26), each representing a wedge color identity. The Jeskai Way venerates cunning and enlightenment, using the dragon's eye as their clan symbol. Lead designer: Mark Rosewater.

"Discipline to persevere, insight to discover." No speaker attributed. The two-clause motto structure is shared across all five banners in the cycle, condensing each clan's philosophy into an epigram.
All four non-Abzan banners in the cycle (Jeskai 222, Mardu 224, Sultai 225, Temur 226) were illustrated by Daniel Ljunggren. The card carries the Jeskai clan watermark on the card frame.
Jeskai Banner has an EDHREC rank of 12,517 — mid-range among the five banners. Mardu Banner (rank 9,750) is the most-included. All five are legal in pauper commander.

Abzan Banner (KTK no. 215, not no. 220) completes the five-banner cycle. KTK no. 220 is Ghostfire Blade, a different artifact. The banner cycle spans nos. 215, 222, 224, 225, 226 — non-consecutive due to set numbering.

related_cards.name: Abzan Banner
related_cards.note: Fifth cycle member, no. 215, Abzan colors W/B/G, also by Daniel Ljunggren

notes.abzan_banner_in_corpus: NOT IN CORPUS — KTK-220 is Ghostfire Blade; Abzan Banner is KTK-215 and has no file under cards/magic-the-gathering/khans-of-tarkir/

Edgelord cycle-cohort trigger condition: 4/5 banners trivia-passed in corpus; Edgelord should assess whether to create a KTK banner cohort node with a note that Abzan Banner is a corpus gap.
